input_mode.title: Input Mode
input_mode.description: How to provide the annual report(s). Use 'pdf_urls' for direct PDF links, 'company_names' for auto-discovery via SEC EDGAR/web, or 'mixed' for both.

pdf_urls.title: PDF Report URLs
pdf_urls.description: Direct URLs to annual report or filing PDFs. Supports SEC EDGAR links, investor relation pages, or any public PDF URL.

company_name_list.title: Company Name List
company_name_list.description: List of company names or ticker symbols. The actor will auto-discover and fetch the most recent annual filing from SEC EDGAR.

report_year.title: Report Year Filter
report_year.description: Target fiscal year for reports. Leave empty for the most recent available. Example: 2023

filing_types.title: Filing Types
filing_types.description: SEC filing types to consider. 10-K is standard annual, 20-F is for foreign private issuers.

extraction_focus.title: Extraction Focus Areas
extraction_focus.description: Which intelligence categories to extract. Select all for comprehensive analysis.

min_evidence_confidence.title: Minimum Evidence Confidence Score
min_evidence_confidence.description: Filter out extractions below this confidence threshold (0.0–1.0). Higher values = fewer but more precise results.

max_pages_per_doc.title: Max Pages to Process Per Document
max_pages_per_doc.description: Limit pages processed per PDF to control cost. Set to 0 for unlimited.

anthropic_api_key.title: Anthropic API Key (Optional)
anthropic_api_key.description: Your Anthropic API key for Claude-powered extraction. If not provided, falls back to free extraction methods.

openai_api_key.title: OpenAI API Key (Optional)
openai_api_key.description: Your OpenAI API key as an alternative AI extraction backend.

proxy_configuration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxy_configuration.description: Apify proxy settings for fetching reports.

notify_webhook_url.title: Webhook Notification URL (Optional)
notify_webhook_url.description: POST results to this URL when extraction completes.
